Gravity migration-network model.

Source: R/extendr-wrappers.R
gravity.Rd

network[i, j] = k * pops[i]^a * pops[j]^b / distance[i, j]^c, with a zero diagonal (no self-migration). Port of laser-core's gravity.

Usage

gravity(pops, distances, k, a, b, c)

Arguments

pops

Numeric vector of node populations (length N, non-negative).

distances

Symmetric N × N numeric distance matrix (e.g. from distances()).

k

Scaling constant for the overall flow magnitude (non-negative).

a

Exponent on the origin population.

b

Exponent on the destination population.

c

Exponent on the distance (larger c = stronger distance decay).

Value

An N × N numeric matrix; [i, j] is the migration weight from node i to node j.

On this page
